ground_truth.description: Person takes first sip from a full beer glass.

mock_response.reason_short: Person lifts full beer glass to mouth — first sip detected.

last_run.reasoning: Frame 1 (0.0s) shows the glass tilted at a drinking angle (>20°) with the rim contacting the lips. Frame 2 (3.0s) demonstrates increased tilt and upward movement of the glass, indicating active drinking motion. The glass is full (beer_fill_level: full), meeting the requirement for a first sip. All four critical conditions are satisfied: tilt >20°, lip contact, liquid flow/swallowing, and temporal motion. Holding or posing without tilt is excluded, but here the action is active drinking.
last_run.reason_short: Glass tilted >20°, rim in contact with lips, liquid flow observed, and temporal motion of tilting upward
